The '''YV-664 light freighter''' was a modern [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] model produced by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]]. It was regarded by many as having a good balance of cargo capacity, durability, and speed.

The ship had the saucer-like shape of the [[YT-series/Legends|YT-series]], giving it the ability to move around easily. The YV-664 had many similarities to the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]], such as the cockpit style and engine configuration, though a few differences from past models existed.
